overall.description: A helicopter flight in a video game departing from a foggy modern city, flying over water to approach the Statue of Liberty, making a close pass around the monument, and turning back toward the city. The footage maintains a first-person cockpit view with the instrument panel visible throughout.

events.description: helicopter leaves city airspace and flies over open water

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter over foggy cityscape toward open water

entered.detail: red instrument panel with gauges and GPS screen showing MAVERICK label
tall modern skyscrapers partially obscured by heavy fog
calm gray water visible below the fog

segments.scene_description: The helicopter departs from a foggy urban environment with tall glass buildings visible through the haze. The camera shows the cockpit instrument panel as the aircraft transitions from city airspace to flying over open water.

events.description: Statue of Liberty becomes visible as a dark silhouette in the distance

agents.ego_description: flying steadily over water toward the distant Statue of Liberty

entered.detail: statue visible as a small dark silhouette on the horizon through fog

segments.scene_description: Flying over the open water with the city skyline fading into fog behind. The Statue of Liberty gradually emerges from the haze ahead, growing larger as the helicopter approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: close approach to Statue of Liberty

events.description: banking right to make a close pass around the statue

agents.ego_description: making a close approach to the Statue of Liberty, observing the monument details

entered.detail: stone pedestal and base structure of the monument
small island with greenery surrounding the statue base

segments.scene_description: The helicopter approaches the Statue of Liberty closely, revealing the statue's base platform and the surrounding island. The monument fills the frame as the aircraft banks to pass by it, with the statue moving from center view to the right side.

events.description: executing a steep left bank turn over the water
city skyline reappears through the fog during the return turn

agents.ego_description: executing a turn to return toward the city, with the statue receding behind

entered.detail: distant city buildings visible through the fog on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks steeply over the water in a left turn, returning toward the city. The urban skyline reappears through the fog in the distance while the Statue of Liberty recedes to the left side and falls behind the aircraft.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit view as a helicopter departs a foggy metropolis to circle the Statue of Liberty before returning toward the city. It begins amidst tall glass buildings shrouded in haze, with the instrument panel visible as the aircraft transitions from the urban environment to open water. As the city skyline fades into the fog behind, the Statue of Liberty gradually emerges from the mist ahead and grows larger in the frame. The camera then closes in on the monument's base and surrounding island, banking sharply so the statue shifts from the center to the right side of the view. Finally, the helicopter performs a steep left turn over the water, leaving the statue to recede to the left as the distant urban skyline reappears through the haze.
